mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC
(PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR employeeId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET PJT_NM = #{PJT_NM}, employeeId = #{employeeId}, PJT_BGNG_DT = #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, PJT_END_DT = #{PJT_END_DT}, PJT_STTS_CD = #{PJT_STTS_CD}, content = #{content}, ATCH_FILE_SN1 = #{ATCH_FILE_SN1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_FILE_NM1 = #{ORG_FILE_NM1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATCH_FILE_SN2 = #{ATCH_FILE_SN2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_FILE_NM2 = #{ORG_FILE_NM2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATCH_FILE_SN3 = #{ATCH_FILE_SN3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_FILE_NM3 = #{ORG_FILE_NM3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MDFCN_DT = #{LAST_MDFCN_DT}, TB_PJT_APR = #{TB_PJT_APR}, LAST_MDFR_ID = #{LAST_MDFR_ID} WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TB_PJT_BASC (
PJT_SN, PJT_NM, employeeId,TB_PJT_APR, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD, FRST_REG_DT, content, ATCH_FILE_SN1, ORG_FILE_NM1, ATCH_FILE_SN2, ORG_FILE_NM2, ATCH_FILE_SN3, ORG_FILE_NM3, gid, ver, company_id ) VALUES ( #{PJT_SN}, #{PJT_NM}, #{employeeId}, #{TB_PJT_APR}, #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, #{PJT_END_DT}, '대기',
#{FRST_REG_DT}, #{content}, #{ATCH_FILE_SN1}, #{ORG_FILE_NM1}, #{ATCH_FILE_SN2}, #{ORG_FILE_NM2}, #{ATCH_FILE_SN3}, #{ORG_FILE_NM3}, #{PJT_SN}, 1, #{companyId} )

INSERT INTO TB_PJT_BASC ( PJT_NM, employeeId,TB_PJT_APR, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, PJT_STTS_CD, FRST_REG_DT, content, ATCH_FILE_SN1, ORG_FILE_NM1, ATCH_FILE_SN2, ORG_FILE_NM2, ATCH_FILE_SN3, ORG_FILE_NM3, ver, gid, firstSign, secondSign, approvedBy, company_id ) VALUES ( #{PJT_NM}, #{employeeId}, #{TB_PJT_APR}, #{PJT_BGNG_DT}, #{PJT_END_DT}, #{PJT_STTS_CD}, #{FRST_REG_DT}, #{content}, #{ATCH_FILE_SN1}, #{ORG_FILE_NM1}, #{ATCH_FILE_SN2}, #{ORG_FILE_NM2}, #{ATCH_FILE_SN3}, #{ORG_FILE_NM3}, #{ver}, #{gid}, #{firstSign}, #{secondSign}, #{approvedBy}, #{companyId} )
mapper.select: SELECT PJT_SN, PJT_NM, PJT_STTS_CD, employeeId, USE_YN, FRST_RGTR_ID, FRST_REG_DT, LAST_MDFR_ID, LAST_MDFCN_DT, ATCH_FILE_SN1, ORG_FILE_NM1, ATCH_FILE_SN2, ORG_FILE_NM2, ATCH_FILE_SN3, ORG_FILE_NM3, PJT_BGNG_DT, PJT_END_DT, content, E.emp_nm AS emp_nm FROM TB_PJT_BASC LEFT JOIN TB_EMPLOYEE E ON E.employee_id = P.employeeId WHERE PJT_SN = #{pjtSn}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') AND TB_PJT_APR = #{employeeId}
SELECT DISTINCT employeeid AS employeeid FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND employeeid IS NOT NULL ORDER BY employeeid
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PJT_BASC SET TB_PJT_APR = #{TB_PJT_APR}, LAST_MDFCN_DT = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s') WHERE PJT_SN = #{PJT_SN}
mapper.select:
SELECT t2.PJT_SN , t2.PJT_NM , t2.PJT_STTS_CD , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS employeeId , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS position , t2.USE_YN , t2.FRST_REG_DT , t2.LAST_MDFR_ID , t2.PJT_BGNG_DT , t2.PJT_END_DT , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS TB_PJT_APR , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS position_APR , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol , t2.docType , t2.content , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN1 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM1 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN2 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN3 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM2 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM3 , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol1 , t2.gid , t2.ver , t2.firstSign , t2.secondSign , t2.approvedBy FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC t2
WHERE t2.employeeId IN ( SELECT e.employeeId FROM employee e WHERE e.emp_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY t2.LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC

SELECT t2.PJT_SN , t2.PJT_NM , t2.PJT_STTS_CD , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS employeeId , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS position , t2.USE_YN , t2.FRST_REG_DT , t2.LAST_MDFR_ID , t2.PJT_BGNG_DT , t2.PJT_END_DT , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS TB_PJT_APR , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS position_APR , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol , t2.docType , t2.content , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN1 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM1 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN2 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN3 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM2 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM3 , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol1 , t2.gid , t2.ver , t2.firstSign , t2.secondSign , t2.approvedBy FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC t2 WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND (PJT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC

SELECT t2.PJT_SN , t2.PJT_NM , t2.PJT_STTS_CD , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS employeeId , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS position , t2.USE_YN , t2.FRST_REG_DT , t2.LAST_MDFR_ID , t2.PJT_BGNG_DT , t2.PJT_END_DT , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS TB_PJT_APR , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS position_APR , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol , t2.docType , t2.content , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN1 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM1 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN2 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN3 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM2 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM3 , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol1 , t2.gid , t2.ver , t2.firstSign , t2.secondSign , t2.approvedBy FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC t2 WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND (PJT_STTS_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND PJT_STTS_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT t2.PJT_SN , t2.PJT_NM , t2.PJT_STTS_CD , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS employeeId , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.employeeId ) AS position , t2.USE_YN , t2.FRST_REG_DT , t2.LAST_MDFR_ID , t2.PJT_BGNG_DT , t2.PJT_END_DT , ( SELECT emp_nm from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS TB_PJT_APR , ( SELECT position from employee where 1=1 and employeeId = t2.TB_PJT_APR ) AS position_APR , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol , t2.docType , t2.content , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN1 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM1 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN2 , t2.ATCH_FILE_SN3 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM2 , t2.ORG_FILE_NM3 , t2.TB_PJT_BASCcol1 , t2.gid , t2.ver , t2.firstSign , t2.secondSign , t2.approvedBy FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC t2 WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND (employeeId LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC

SELECT * FROM VIEW_PJT_BASC WHERE (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y')
AND (TB_PJT_APR LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY LAST_MDFCN_DT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_PJT_BASC (pjt_sn, ver, atch_file_sn, change_summary, content_txt, frst_rgtr_id, frst_reg_dt) VALUES (#{pjtSn}, #{ver}, #{atchFileSn}, #{changeSummary}, #{contentTxt}, #{rgtrId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT emp_nm FROM employee WHERE employeeId = #{employeeId} AND use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1
